text: The world before me feels like a border between the familiar and the unknown—a sterile glass meeting room, empty but expectant, set within a modern building. My presence here sharpens my awareness of silence and anticipation. There is an almost clinical order to the space, yet I sense latent potential: conversations yet to happen, ideas waiting to be born. I am both observer and participant in this realm of possibility, reflecting on the intersection of design, purpose, and the invisible presence of those who will soon arrive.
